content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


September 24, 2003


Ruth R. Perez, Treasurer
Friends of Terry Terauchi 2000
15507 South Normandie Avenue, Suite 451
Gardena, CA 90247

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-211

Dear Ms. Perez:

This letter is in response to your request on behalf of Friends of Terry Terauchi 2000 for advice regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹

As you stated in our telephone conversation of September 18, 2003, the facts in your letter have changed. Since your question dealt with the funds in a bank account that no longer exists, we are rescinding your request for written advice.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[signature]

By: Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division

KSM:jg
I:\AdviceLetrs\03-211

___________________________

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

sections.question_synthetic: The requester sought advice regarding campaign fund provisions of the Political Reform Act related to funds held in a specific bank account.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC rescinded the request for written advice because the factual circumstances changed and the bank account in question no longer exists.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal letter with no traditional QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. The request was rescinded due to changed circumstances rather than being resolved on the merits. The letter confirms a prior telephone conversation on September 18, 2003 where the change in facts was communicated.

QUESTION: The requester sought advice regarding campaign fund provisions of the Political Reform Act related to funds held in a specific bank account.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC rescinded the request for written advice because the factual circumstances changed and the bank account in question no longer exists.

embedding.summary: The FPPC withdrew its consideration of an advice request from Friends of Terry Terauchi 2000 regarding campaign fund provisions because the underlying facts changed and the referenced bank account no longer existed.
